title: CRISPResso analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5us05","text":"This protocol describes the process of using CRISPResso to analyze Next Generation Sequencing (NGS) data from CRISPR-targeted, genome-edited samples. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dhift","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cga6p","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In linux, use the following command: CRISPResso --fastq_r1 R1_reads.fastq.gz –fastq_r2 R2_reads.fastq.gz --amplicon_seq amplicon_seqeunce_here -g sgRNA_sequence_here
Use CRISPRessoBatch command if having many samples
For more details, https://github.com/pinellolab/CRISPResso2 CRISPResso2 provides accurate and rapid genome editing sequence analysis.. Nature biotechnology.
creator: Hanqin Li
